title: HPE security advisory (AV26-700)
description: On July 14, 2026, HPE published security advisories to address vulnerabilities in the following products. Included were critical updates for the following:
products: HPE Telco Intelligent Assurance (FAS and PDO)   versions 4.2.15 and prior
HPE Unified OSS Console (UOC)   versions 3.1.21 and prior
HPE Unified OSS Console Assurance Monitoring (UOCAM)   versions 3.1.21 and prior
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
